briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating whether FICR CODEPAGESIZE register is present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR INFO.CODEPAGESIZE register is present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR CODESIZE register is present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR INFO.CODESIZE register is present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR DEVICEID[n] registers are present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR INFO.DEVICEID[n] registers are present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR NFC.TAGHEADERn registers are present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR NFC registers have tagheader array layout.
Symbol indicating whether FICR DEVICEADDR[n] registers are present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR BLE.ADDR[n] registers are present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR ER[n] registers are present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR BLE.ER[n] registers are present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR IR[n] registers are present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR BLE.IR[n] registers are present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR GLOBAL.COMP.REFTRIM register is present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR GLOBAL.SAADC.CAL register is present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR GLOBAL.SAADC.CALREF register is present.
Symbol indicating whether FICR GLOBAL.SAADC.LINCALCOEFF register is present.
Function for getting the size of the code memory page.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Code memory page size in bytes.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the size of the code memory rendered as number of pages.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Code memory size rendered as number of pages.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the unique device identifier.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the default header values for the NFC tag.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: The default header value of the NFC tag for the specified header index.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the unique device address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the unique encryption root.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the unique identity root.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the reftrim value for comparator.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the calibration value of a given index for SAADC.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the reference calibration value for SAADC.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the linear calibration coefficient of a given index for SAADC.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
